<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<meta name="description" content="Lemnos builds automated ABM pipelines that generate qualified leads and keep them moving toward close for SMBs in rehab, healthcare, and home services.">
<title>Lemnos — ABM Pipeline Development</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,wght@0,300;0,700;0,900;1,300&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --kelly: #4DBD14;
    --forest: #2D6A2D;
    --orange: #C4612A;
    --black: #1A1A1A;
    --off-white: #F7F6F2;
    --light-gray: #EFEFEB;
    --mid-gray: #888880;
    --white: #ffffff;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    background: var(--off-white);
    color: var(--black);
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(247,246,242,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    padding: 0 5%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    height: 70px;
  }

  .nav-logo img {
    height: 88px;
    width: auto;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 36px;
    list-style: none;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    text-decoration: none;
    color: var(--black);
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--kelly); }

  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--kelly) !important;
    color: var(--white) !important;
    padding: 10px 22px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    transition: background 0.2s !important;
  }

  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--forest) !important; color: var(--white) !important; }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 120px 5% 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -200px; right: -200px;
    width: 700px; height: 700px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(77,189,20,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .hero::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -100px; left: -100px;
    width: 500px; height: 500px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(196,97,42,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .hero-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .hero-label {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--kelly);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--kelly);
    border-radius: 2px;
  }

  .hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 5vw, 4.2rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.08;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    color: var(--black);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .hero h1 span {
    color: var(--kelly);
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1.12rem;
    color: #444;
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--white);
    padding: 15px 32px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .btn-primary:hover {
    background: var(--kelly);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  .btn-secondary {
    color: var(--black);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    transition: gap 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-secondary:hover { gap: 14px; color: var(--kelly); }

  .hero-right {
    position: relative;
  }

  .hero-card {
    background: var(--white);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 32px;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    position: relative;
  }

  .hero-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 4px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--kelly), var(--forest));
    border-radius: 12px 12px 0 0;
  }

  .stat-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 24px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  .stat-item { text-align: center; }

  .stat-number {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 2.4rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--black);
    line-height: 1;
    display: block;
  }

  .stat-number span { color: var(--kelly); }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--mid-gray);
    font-weight: 500;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    margin-top: 4px;
    display: block;
  }

  .stat-divider {
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--light-gray);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .hero-card-footer {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--mid-gray);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .hero-card-footer::before {
    content: '';
    display: inline-block;
    width: 8px; height: 8px;
    background: var(--kelly);
    border-radius: 50%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* MARQUEE */
  .marquee-bar {
    background: var(--black);
    padding: 14px 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .marquee-track {
    display: inline-flex;
    gap: 60px;
    animation: marquee 25s linear infinite;
  }

  .marquee-item {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .marquee-item strong { color: var(--kelly); }

  @keyframes marquee {
    from { transform: translateX(0); }
    to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
  }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section { padding: 100px 5%; }

  .section-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }

  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--kelly);
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.12;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    color: var(--black);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .section-sub {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    color: #555;
    font-weight: 300;
    max-width: 560px;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* PROBLEM */
  .problem { background: var(--white); }

  .problem-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }

  .problem-list {
    list-style: none;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .problem-list li {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 14px;
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: #444;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .problem-list li::before {
    content: '×';
    color: var(--orange);
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-top: 2px;
  }

  .solution-box {
    background: var(--off-white);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 40px;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--kelly);
  }

  .solution-box p {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: #333;
    line-height: 1.75;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .solution-box strong { color: var(--black); font-weight: 600; }

  /* LEMNOS LINE */
  .lemnos-line { background: var(--off-white); }

  .line-steps {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 32px;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }

  .step-card {
    background: var(--white);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 36px 32px;
    position: relative;
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .step-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  }

  .step-card::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 3px;
    background: var(--kelly);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transition: transform 0.3s;
    transform-origin: left;
  }

  .step-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

  .step-num {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 3.5rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--light-gray);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .step-title {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 1.35rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--black);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .step-desc {
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    color: #666;
    line-height: 1.65;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .step-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 20px;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--kelly);
    padding: 5px 12px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(77,189,20,0.3);
    border-radius: 2px;
  }

  /* RESULTS */
  .results { background: var(--black); }

  .results .section-label { color: var(--kelly); }
  .results .section-title { color: var(--white); }
  .results .section-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }

  .results-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 2px;
    margin-top: 60px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .result-item {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    padding: 48px 40px;
    position: relative;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }

  .result-item:hover { background: rgba(77,189,20,0.08); }

  .result-number {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 3.2rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--kelly);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .result-desc {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .result-source {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-top: 12px;
  }

  /* WHO WE SERVE */
  .niches { background: var(--white); }

  .niche-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 24px;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }

  .niche-card {
    border: 1.5px solid var(--light-gray);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 36px 28px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    cursor: default;
  }

  .niche-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--kelly);
    background: rgba(77,189,20,0.03);
  }

  .niche-icon {
    font-size: 2rem;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .niche-title {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--black);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .niche-desc {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #666;
    line-height: 1.65;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .niche-pain {
    margin-top: 16px;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--orange);
    font-weight: 600;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  /* ABOUT */
  .about { background: var(--off-white); }

  .about-inner {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: start;
  }

  .about-text p {
    font-size: 1.02rem;
    color: #444;
    line-height: 1.8;
    font-weight: 300;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .mission-vision {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .mv-card {
    background: var(--white);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 28px;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--forest);
  }

  .mv-card.vision { border-left-color: var(--orange); }

  .mv-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--forest);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .mv-card.vision .mv-label { color: var(--orange); }

  .mv-text {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--black);
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  /* CONTACT */
  .contact { background: var(--white); }

  .contact-inner {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: start;
  }

  .contact-form {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 18px;
  }

  .form-group {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .form-group label {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--mid-gray);
  }

  .form-group input,
  .form-group select,
  .form-group textarea {
    padding: 13px 16px;
    border: 1.5px solid #E0E0D8;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: var(--black);
    background: var(--off-white);
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
    outline: none;
    resize: none;
  }

  .form-group input:focus,
  .form-group select:focus,
  .form-group textarea:focus {
    border-color: var(--kelly);
  }

  .form-submit {
    background: var(--kelly);
    color: var(--white);
    border: none;
    padding: 16px 32px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    margin-top: 8px;
  }

  .form-submit:hover {
    background: var(--forest);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  .contact-info p {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: #555;
    line-height: 1.75;
    font-weight: 300;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  .contact-detail {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: var(--black);
  }

  .contact-detail a {
    color: var(--black);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .contact-detail a:hover { color: var(--kelly); }

  .contact-icon {
    width: 38px; height: 38px;
    background: var(--off-white);
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    background: var(--black);
    padding: 48px 5%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .footer-logo img { height: 36px; filter: brightness(0) invert(1); }

  .footer-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 28px;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .footer-links a {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--kelly); }

  .footer-copy {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
  }

  /* ANIMATIONS */
  .fade-in {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(24px);
    transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease;
  }

  .fade-in.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .hero-inner,
    .problem-grid,
    .about-inner,
    .contact-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 48px; }
    .line-steps,
    .results-grid,
    .niche-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .stat-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Lemnos">
  </div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#results">Results</a></li>
    <li><a href="#niches">Who We Serve</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Let's Talk</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-left fade-in">
      <span class="hero-label">ABM Pipeline Development</span>
      <h1>Your leads deserve a <span>fair shot</span> at closing.</h1>
      <p class="hero-sub">Most SMBs generate decent leads. The problem is what happens after — slow follow-up, inconsistent outreach, and pipelines that stall. We build the system that fixes that.</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary">Let's Talk →</a>
        <a href="#services" class="btn-secondary">See How It Works →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-right fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.2s;">
      <div class="hero-card">
        <div class="stat-grid">
          <div class="stat-item">
            <span class="stat-number">$<span>1.5</span>M</span>
            <span class="stat-label">Revenue Generated</span>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-item">
            <span class="stat-number"><span>65</span>%</span>
            <span class="stat-label">Conversion Lift</span>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-item">
            <span class="stat-number"><span>20</span>%</span>
            <span class="stat-label">CPA Reduction</span>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-item">
            <span class="stat-number">$<span>300</span>K</span>
            <span class="stat-label">Closed in 3 Months</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-divider"></div>
        <p class="hero-card-footer">Real results from real clients — no inflated projections.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MARQUEE -->
<div class="marquee-bar">
  <div class="marquee-track">
    <span class="marquee-item"><strong>ABM Strategy</strong></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">CRM Integration</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><strong>Lead Generation</strong></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Pipeline Automation</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><strong>Email Outreach</strong></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Paid Search</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><strong>The Lemnos Line</strong></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Rehab & Treatment</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><strong>Healthcare</strong></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Home Services</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><strong>ABM Strategy</strong></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">CRM Integration</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><strong>Lead Generation</strong></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Pipeline Automation</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><strong>Email Outreach</strong></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Paid Search</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><strong>The Lemnos Line</strong></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Rehab & Treatment</span>
    <span class="marquee-item"><strong>Healthcare</strong></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Home Services</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROBLEM -->
<section class="problem" id="problem">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="problem-grid">
      <div class="fade-in">
        <p class="section-label">The Problem</p>
        <h2 class="section-title">Good leads. Broken pipeline.</h2>
        <ul class="problem-list" style="margin-top: 32px;">
          <li>Leads come in but nobody follows up fast enough</li>
          <li>Outreach is inconsistent — some get emails, some get nothing</li>
          <li>Sales team is too busy closing to nurture the top of the funnel</li>
          <li>CRM is a mess or doesn't exist at all</li>
          <li>You're paying for leads that never had a real shot</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.15s;">
        <div class="solution-box">
          <p class="section-label" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">The Fix</p>
          <p>We build the <strong>infrastructure behind your pipeline</strong> — the outreach sequences, the automations, the CRM workflows — so every lead gets a timely, personalized, non-invasive touch the moment they raise their hand.</p>
          <br>
          <p>You focus on closing. <strong>We handle everything before that conversation happens.</strong></p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- LEMNOS LINE -->
<section class="lemnos-line" id="services">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="fade-in">
      <p class="section-label">Our Framework</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">The Lemnos Line</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">A three-part system built so no lead ever falls through the cracks.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="line-steps">
      <div class="step-card fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.1s;">
        <div class="step-num">01</div>
        <h3 class="step-title">ABM Strategy & CRM</h3>
        <p class="step-desc">We identify your ideal customer profile, build or optimize your CRM, and create a target account list so your outreach starts with the right people — not a spray-and-pray blast.</p>
        <span class="step-tag">Foundation</span>
      </div>
      <div class="step-card fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.2s;">
        <div class="step-num">02</div>
        <h3 class="step-title">Programmatic Outreach</h3>
        <p class="step-desc">Personalized, timely email sequences and paid search campaigns built around your buyer's behavior. Not generic templates — outreach that actually sounds like a human wrote it.</p>
        <span class="step-tag">Activation</span>
      </div>
      <div class="step-card fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.3s;">
        <div class="step-num">03</div>
        <h3 class="step-title">Automated Follow-Up</h3>
        <p class="step-desc">Automated sequences that keep leads warm and alert your sales team at exactly the right moment. No lead loses momentum. No opportunity gets forgotten.</p>
        <span class="step-tag">Conversion</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- RESULTS -->
<section class="results" id="results">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="fade-in">
      <p class="section-label">Proof</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Results that speak plainly.</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">No inflated projections. No vanity metrics. Just what actually happened.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="results-grid">
      <div class="result-item fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.1s;">
        <div class="result-number">00K</div>
        <p class="result-desc">Insurance client closed 00K in rewritten policies within 3 months after we rebuilt their remarketing system — lead list, domain reputation, email templates, automations, and sales handoff.</p>
        <p class="result-source">Insurance Client</p>
      </div>
      <div class="result-item fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.2s;">
        <div class="result-number">+65%</div>
        <p class="result-desc">Professional services client saw 65% more conversions after we built their full ABM program from scratch — CRM, lead scoring, outreach sequences, and pipeline automations.</p>
        <p class="result-source">Professional Services Client</p>
      </div>
      <div class="result-item fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.3s;">
        <div class="result-number">−20%</div>
        <p class="result-desc">Reduced cost per acquisition by 20% within the first two months by rebuilding the lead gen and paid search strategy for an SMB client with a leaking pipeline.</p>
        <p class="result-source">SMB Client</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- NICHES -->
<section class="niches" id="niches">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="fade-in">
      <p class="section-label">Who We Serve</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Industries where every lead matters.</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">We focus on industries where slow follow-up has real consequences — not just lost revenue.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="niche-grid">
      <div class="niche-card fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.1s;">
        <div class="niche-icon">🏥</div>
        <h3 class="niche-title">Rehab & Treatment</h3>
        <p class="niche-desc">A missed call or a slow response in this space isn't just a lost deal — it's a family that didn't get help when they needed it most. We build systems that respond fast and follow up consistently.</p>
        <p class="niche-pain">"A missed lead here isn't just revenue. It's someone's life."</p>
      </div>
      <div class="niche-card fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.2s;">
        <div class="niche-icon">🩺</div>
        <h3 class="niche-title">Healthcare</h3>
        <p class="niche-desc">Patients don't wait. If your follow-up is slow, they've already booked with a competitor. We build pipelines that respond at the speed your patients expect.</p>
        <p class="niche-pain">"Slow follow-up means patients go elsewhere."</p>
      </div>
      <div class="niche-card fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.3s;">
        <div class="niche-icon">🔧</div>
        <h3 class="niche-title">Home Services</h3>
        <p class="niche-desc">When a homeowner needs a job done, they call three companies and go with whoever responds first. We make sure that's you — every time, without adding headcount.</p>
        <p class="niche-pain">"First to respond wins the job."</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="about-inner">
      <div class="about-text fade-in">
        <p class="section-label">About Lemnos</p>
        <h2 class="section-title">Built by someone who knows what it means to bounce back.</h2>
        <p>Lemnos was built on a simple belief: good people and honest businesses deserve the same tools and opportunities as anyone else — regardless of where they started.</p>
        <p>Our founder has spent years building lead gen and pipeline systems across insurance, healthcare, and professional services. The pattern was always the same: great businesses, great products, leads that went cold before anyone had a real shot.</p>
        <p>The Lemnos Line exists to fix that. Not with hacks or shortcuts — with systems that actually work, built by someone who's been in the trenches and knows the difference.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="mission-vision fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.2s;">
        <div class="mv-card">
          <p class="mv-label">Our Mission</p>
          <p class="mv-text">"We empower SMBs to build the systems that give every lead a fair shot at becoming a client."</p>
        </div>
        <div class="mv-card vision">
          <p class="mv-label">Our Vision</p>
          <p class="mv-text">"A world where good people and honest businesses get the tools, support, and opportunity to realize their full potential — regardless of where they started."</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="contact" id="contact">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="contact-inner">
      <div class="fade-in">
        <p class="section-label">Get In Touch</p>
        <h2 class="section-title">Let's stop the bleeding.</h2>
        <p class="contact-info" style="margin-top: 20px;">If your pipeline is inconsistent or leads are going cold before they close, shoot us a message. No pitch, no pressure — just an honest conversation about whether we're the right fit.</p>
        <div class="contact-detail">
          <div class="contact-icon">✉</div>
          <a href="mailto:pete@lemnos.io">pete@lemnos.io</a>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-detail">
          <div class="contact-icon">in</div>
          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/pete-delago" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/pete-delago</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fade-in" style="transition-delay: 0.15s;">
        <form class="contact-form" onsubmit="handleSubmit(event)">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Name</label>
            <input type="text" placeholder="Your name" required>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Email</label>
            <input type="email" placeholder="you@company.com" required>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Industry</label>
            <select>
              <option value="">Select your industry</option>
              <option>Rehab & Treatment</option>
              <option>Healthcare</option>
              <option>Home Services</option>
              <option>Other</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>What's going on?</label>
            <textarea rows="4" placeholder="Tell us what's not working in your pipeline..."></textarea>
          </div>
          <button type="submit" class="form-submit">Send It →</button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Lemnos">
  </div>
  <ul class="footer-links">
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#results">Results</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <p class="footer-copy">© 2026 Lemnos. All rights reserved.</p>
</footer>

<script>
  // Fade in on scroll
  const fadeEls = document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  fadeEls.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  // Trigger hero immediately
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.hero .fade-in').forEach(el => el.classList.add('visible'));
  }, 100);

  // Form submit
  function handleSubmit(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const btn = e.target.querySelector('.form-submit');
    btn.textContent = 'Sent ✓';
    btn.style.background = 'var(--forest)';
    setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Send It →'; btn.style.background = ''; }, 3000);
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
